messages.content:
Which of the following documents do you NOT need to carry for an interview?

a.
Passport size photographs

b.
All certificates (educational and/or professional)

c.
All of these options

d.
Resume/Curriculum Vitae (CV)
c. All of these options

You are rather older in comparison to all your colleagues. The young people in the organisation are rather free-spirited and prefer an unconventional work setting.

a.
There is no need to bend in into the environment, stand your ground and by your beliefs.

b.
Try to gel in with your colleagues, be open to learning new concepts and ideas.

c.
Ask your boss to make sure that the unconventional style is not adopted.

d.
Try to preach your ways to the youngsters and influence them to your thinking.
b. Try to gel in with your colleagues, be open to learning new concepts and ideas.

According to the ‘REASON’ model which expansion is correct from the following?

a.
Research information, Effort, Act accordingly, Structure, Evaluate reason, Narrate perception.

b.
Research information, Evidence based analysis, Analyse, State fact , Evaluate reason, And Narrate

c.
Relevant Information, Evidence - based reasoning, Analyse Arguments, Structure, Evaluate objections, Narrate findings.

d.
Refer, Effective argument, Analyse, Structure, Evaluate reason, Narrate perception.
c. Relevant Information, Evidence-based reasoning, Analyse Arguments, Structure, Evaluate objections, Narrate findings.

Ben is an entrepreneur and heavily invests in digital marketing for establishing his business. Juan comes across Ben’s advertisement and becomes inquisitive about some products from Ben. Which type of customer can you consider Juan to be?

a.
Negative

b.
Past

c.
Current

d.
Potential
d. Potential

What impression does punctuality leave on people?

a.
That you cannot be trusted with small assignments.

b.
That you are sincere and respect other people's time.

c.
That you are likely to take things too seriously.

d.
That you are aggressive and not to be messed with.
b. That you are sincere and respect other people's time.

Which of the following should you NOT talk about, while answering interview questions about your professional goals?

a.
Talking confidently about your career goals

b.
Talking about your long-term career plans in accordance with the needs of the company

c.
Talking about the positive aspects of your previous work experience

d.
Talking about unrealistic goals and aspirations
d. Talking about unrealistic goals and aspirations

On a very busy day, which of the following tasks can be parked to be completed later?

a.
Completing the tasks for the week

b.
A casual meeting with friends

c.
Submit a work report as per deadline

d.
Eating meals
b. A casual meeting with friends

Kane is always optimistic about situations and interactions, and stays hopeful even during difficult situations. He does not give up. Kane has a ______.

a.
Emotional attitude

b.
Neutral attitude

c.
Negative attitude

d.
Positive attitude
d. Positive attitude

Kane is always optimistic about situations and interactions, and stays hopeful even during difficult situations. He does not give up. Kane has a ______.

a.
Emotional attitude

b.
Neutral attitude

c.
Negative attitude

d.
Positive attitude
d. Positive attitude

The SUCCESS model determines the end output of teamwork. Select the accurate keywords for “SUCCESS”.

a.
Specific,Understand,Challenges,Clever,Enhance,Share and Set.

b.
Specific,Understand,Challenges,Clear,Enhance,Share and Set.

c.
Summarize,Understand,Challenges,Clear,Enhance,Share and Set.

d.
Summarize,Understand,Challenges,Clever,Enhance,Share and Set.
b. Specific, Understand, Challenges, Clear, Enhance, Share, and Set.

Which of these call help you listen actively and attentively?

a.
Visualizing the words the speaker is using

b.
All of these options

c.
Using eye contact and looking at the speaker

d.
Putting away the mobile phone or leaving it on Silent mode
b. All of these options

Quality starts with __________.

a.
Quality analyst

b.
Me

c.
Engineers

d.
Manager
b. Me
